EmilyEvent.Dialogue1: Hi, @! Look what I've made! I sewed two of these banners... One for you, and one for my room.
EmilyEvent.Dialogue2: But when I tried to hang it up, I realized I have no space left at all! I'll have to figure that out later...$s#$b#Anyway, yours is ready! Let this bird remind you of freedom. See you!$h
ChickenBanner.Name: Chicken Banner
ShaneEvent.GiftText: By the way... take this banner. It'll look great on your wall.$h
ShaneMail.Text: Hey @,^I noticed your pockets were full when I showed you my chickens earlier.^I wanted you to have this banner to remember the blue ones!^   - Shane
FishBanner.Name: Big Fish Banner
WillyFishMail.Text: Hello, @!^I've seen you fishing lately. You're making great progress!^Old Willy rarely misjudges people, and you definitely have talent. Patience and a steady hand — that's the secret of a true master.^I found this banner in some old chests and thought it would look great on your wall.^Keep up the good work!^   - Willy %item object (F)MyCustomFishBanner 1 %%[#]A Gift from Willy
GoldCoconutBanner.Name: Tropical Coconut Banner
Mail.WinterStar.Text: Happy Feast of the Winter Star!^In honor of the holiday, I am sending you a special rare banner to decorate your farm.^Let it remind you of this winter.^^Sincerely,^A Mysterious Sender %item object (F)MyCustomWinterStarBanner 1 %%[#]Holiday Gift
MomBanner.Name: Mom's Banner
Mail.MomAnniversary.Text: Hi, sweetie!^A whole year has passed since your wedding! Time flies so fast.^I thought this banner would look great decorating your home.^With love, Mom %item object (F)MyCustomMomBanner 1 %%[#]Gift from Mom
SummerBanner.Name: Summer Banner
